verbatim: 13 | DTHDTC | Date/Time of Death | Char | ISO 8601 datetime or interval | Record Qualifier | | Not in nonclinical trials | C117450 | The date or date and time of death, represented in a standardized character format. | Should represent the date/time that is captured in the clinical-trial database. |

20 | AGETXT | Age Text | Char | number-number | Record Qualifier | | | C170982 | The age at a specific point in time defined for the trial, expressed as a range. | The age of the subject at study start, as planned, expressed as a range. If an age integer value is available, then populate the age variable instead. Either the AGE or AGETXT variable should be populated, but not both. |

37 | DMDTC | Date/Time of Collection | Char | ISO 8601 datetime or interval | Timing | | | C83243 | The date or date and time of demographic data collection, represented in a standardized character format. | |
7 | COSEQ | Sequence Number | Num | | Identifier | | | | | | Sequence number to ensure uniqueness within the dataset.
11 | COVAL | Comment | Char | | Topic | | | | | The text of the comment. Text over 200 characters can be added to additional columns COVAL1-COVALn. |
Planned repro stages are described in the Trial Design Model (see Section 5.1.3.1, Trial Repro Stages).
Subject Visits—One Record per Subject Visit, per Subject
heading_text: Subject Visits—One Record per Subject Visit, per Subject

verbatim: 4 | SMSEQ | Sequence Number | Num | | Identifier | | | | | | Sequence number given to ensure uniqueness of subject records. Should be assigned to be consistent with chronological order.
